workout.notes: The morning is still the best part. Forty minutes of nothing to manage.

work.focus: VP conversation about Q2 staffing; board deck section 2
work.notes: Good day. The kind where I know what I'm doing and it works. The VP was receptive; the deck is coming together. I am not struggling with the work. I keep waiting to find a word for what I am struggling with.

therapy.notes: I have not rescheduled it. This feels like an accomplishment, which tells me something.

ecuador.notes: Tom looked up the organization I went with in 2009. They still exist. He showed me the website without saying anything. I looked at it for a long time. I don't know what I'm looking for. I know I'm looking for something.
ecuador.ideas_app: Opened the notes app again. Read the entry from 2022: 'what would you do if the money was the same.' I think the question is wrong. I think the real question is what I would do if it wasn't.

kids.jake: First tutoring session today. He was frustrated and then proud. She knows what she's doing.
kids.emma: Made a presentation about her robotics camp project for us at dinner. Tom and I gave feedback with straight faces. She was magnificent.

saturday.notes: 15 minutes late but I'm counting it. Tom noticed. He didn't make a big thing of it. The noticing was enough.

at_risk: Ecuador question is getting louder, not quieter — need to do something with it before it becomes a crisis
note: The ideas app. 47 entries going back to 2018 and I have acted on none of them. I don't think all of them are good ideas. I think some of them are the same idea, written over and over because I didn't know what to do with it.
